title: Niko Plush Resource Pack
description: Replaces torch and totem of undying to Niko from OneShot
body:
# what is this

This is **Niko** plush model from [OneShot](https://store.steampowered.com/app/420530/OneShot/) that was made by me.

Replaces torch and totem of undying just rename them into "**Niko**".

### why u should download this

just because it is a cute cat i think
